title: Pink Minerals
description: Changes some Minecraft's Ores to be pink!
body:
# About
This pack changes Diamonds, Gold, and Nether Quartz to their pink variants.


i.e. Diamonds become Pink Diamonds, Gold becomes Rose Quartz, and Nether Quartz becomes Nether Rose Quartz.

Example:
![Image showing how Diamond ore's and Diamond block has changed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11af0d89ceba4ad16c951fc4f90469f4e4c5b5e6.png)

All related blocks and items also change too.
## Why are there duplicate folders in the Zip?
If you are seeing this when opening the pack, this is a byproduct of me being on a Mac.
MacOS makes these files when archiving files, these are MacOS metadata files that contain info that only MacOS uses.
